company.name_jp: 株式会社フューチャーネットワークス

research_notes: Researched on 2026-06-26. Company founded 1996, 20th anniversary in 2016. Located in Yokohama Minato Mirai (headquarters) and Amami Oshima (development center). CEO: 中山. Business: Web production, development, hosting, SEO, IT consulting. KIA vice president 中山. Privacy Mark certified. Flat organizational culture emphasizing employee happiness.
